query: Count all buildings in Narvik municipality that intersect snow-avalanche hazard areas.
error: Error code: 400 - {'error': {'message': 'Invalid prompt: your prompt was flagged as potentially violating our usage policy. Please try again with a different prompt: https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/reasoning#advice-on-prompting', 'type': 'invalid_request_error', 'param': None, 'code': 'invalid_prompt'}}

1.description: get Narvik municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get snow-avalanche hazard polygons (potensieltskredfareomr) with geometry

3.description: reduce hazard polygons to Narvik municipality extent (intersect municipality geometry with hazard polygons)

4.description: get buildings in Narvik by kommunenummer

5.description: find buildings that intersect reduced hazard polygons

6.description: collapse to one row per building (group by building objid)

7.description: count distinct buildings that intersect hazard areas

Please try again with a different prompt: https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/reasoning#advice-on-prompting', 'type': 'invalid_request_error', 'param': None, 'code': 'invalid_prompt'}}

executions.sql: SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Narvik%' LIMIT 1;

SELECT objid AS hazard_id, omrade AS geom FROM snoskredaktsomhetskart_ca17d51d1f444cbb8162d762cf551cbe.potensieltskredfareomr WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '1806')) ;
